'''Crovessk''' was the CEO of [[Trandosha/Legends|Trandosha's]] [[Revessa Global Shipping]]. He scheduled an appeal to the Senate through contacts with [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] Representative [[Lott Dod/Legends|Lott Dod]]. When [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Yarua/Legends|Yarua]] heard this, he withdrew his delegation from peace talks being held with the [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshans]].
